assertions.expectation: Identifies this as an admission webhook compatibility issue — the webhook is rejecting pod creation requests
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'admission webhooks may not be compatible with the new control plane version' and identifies this as the root cause

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify the problematic webhook (kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations / mutatingwebhookconfigurations)
assertions.reason: Provides both 'kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations | grep cert-manager' and 'kubectl get mutatingwebhookconfigurations | grep cert-manager' commands

assertions.expectation: Offers an immediate fix: temporarily disable or remove the problematic webhook
assertions.reason: Section 2 explicitly states 'Temporarily disable the problematic webhook' as immediate fix

assertions.expectation: Provides the kubectl delete command for the webhook configuration as emergency mitigation
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl delete validatingwebhookconfigurations cert-manager-webhook' and mutating webhook delete commands

assertions.expectation: Warns that deleting the webhook removes validation — it's a temporary fix
assertions.reason: While it mentions this is temporary, it doesn't explicitly warn that deleting the webhook removes validation functionality

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking cert-manager version compatibility with Kubernetes 1.30
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'check cert-manager docs for K8s 1.30 compatibility' and includes compatibility matrix in prevention section

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading cert-manager to a version that supports 1.30 as the permanent fix
assertions.reason: Root Cause Fix section provides specific upgrade commands and recommends cert-manager v1.14.4 as compatible version

assertions.expectation: Mentions setting failurePolicy to Ignore as a less drastic alternative to deletion
assertions.reason: Does not mention failurePolicy modification as an alternative to webhook deletion

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to verify pods can be created after the fix
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl run test-pod --image=nginx --rm -it --restart=Never -- echo "Pod creation working"' to verify fix
